title: Mongoose Basics Quiz
description: Test your basic knowledge of Mongoose ODM for MongoDB.

questions.question: What kind of database interface is Mongoose?
In Mongoose, what is used to define the structure of a document within a collection?
Which method is used to persist a new document instance to the database?
Which of these is a valid Mongoose query to find documents worth more than 10 points?
Mongoose can be used for which of these databases?
